title: They trick you and you cannot cancel the subscription
review: Not useful

title: Charged on Day One
review: Be careful I signed up for the free trial and was charged 24.99 the same day I immediately requested a refund through Apple, but it was denied very frustrating experience and not what I expected from a free trial watch their subscriptions closely.

title: False free trial
review: I’ve subscribed for one week free trial but got charged for one month and they did not reimburse.

title: Wonderful
review:
I really like this app. I try to do 2 minutes on a random prompt every day. The convo section is also great.

One minor feature I wish was there: in addition to the option of manually adding prompts to the interview setting, I wish we could do like a 5 or 10-question random shuffle, much like a real interview would be, where the interviewee is forced to be fast on his feet for a series of questions.

title: **only 6-Day free trial, not 7-day** Make sure to cancel on the day that you subscribe
review: This app is inflexible about cancellations.  Make sure to cancel when you first sign up, otherwise Apple will deny your refund request.

title: Situations Not Realistic
review: The app is useful, however the conversational situation exercises don’t give the user enough context on the situation. So instead of focusing on speaking, I’m forced to focus on the unrealistic fictional situations that should be provided to me in the exercise.

title: I love me some Speeko! A Game Changer for all Public Speakers
review:
I discovered the Speeko app back in 2019, just after it launched, and I’ve been using it ever since to practice and record my Toastmasters speeches, presentations, and even comedy bits.
One of the hardest parts of becoming a better speaker is simply getting enough practice—and Speeko makes that easy. I use it to record speeches, track my progress, and work on things like pacing. I tend to talk too fast when I’m excited or nervous, and the AI feedback has been a game changer for helping me slow down and improve my delivery.
They’ve also created something I think is absolutely genius called “Talko Tuesdays”—a weekly 45-minute live session where users can join in and practice impromptu speaking together. It gives you a safe place to practice, builds a sense of community, and even lets you experience a bit of their live coaching style. For anyone who’s ever struggled with impromptu speaking (hello, Toastmasters Table Topics!), this is incredibly helpful.
Recently I also tried one of Speeko’s live coaching sessions while preparing for a speech contest, and it was a total game changer. My coach, Jen, gave thoughtful, practical feedback that helped me refine my delivery in ways I hadn’t considered. The session was absolutely worth it—and the improvements helped me advance to the next level of the contest.
If you’re in Toastmasters—or anyone looking to become a more confident communicator—I can’t recommend Speeko enough. It truly feels like having a speaking coach in your pocket.
I’ve loved watching this small Chicago startup grow over the years, and it’s exciting to see them continue building tools and community that genuinely help people become better speakers. Huge kudos to the Speeko team—and especially Jen! 🎤👏

title: Wait this is fun
review: The UI of this app is so solid. Really well put together and fun to use! I like that there are different components so you can find the type of practice that works for you. Actually makes me want to get better at speaking.

title: Predatory Marketing
review: It will charge you the full amount without notifying you

title: It really helps
review: Stick with it and it makes progress. I try to practice 3-4 times a week. Great improvement to my public speaking.

title: Not great
review:
This is not a good app. Very expensive and it doesn’t really teach you much. It records you saying basic things and then you have to critique yourself but you can do that with your camera. There is not really much coaching either. You basically have to teach yourself which defeats the purpose of paying all this money. Can’t refund and get my 60 bucks back either

There are better options out there. Just wish I would’ve researched before buying this one

title: What are you waiting for?
review: i’ve been working on my speech for probably 10 years now and this tool has improved my articulation and monotoneness with tips, feedback,and techniques in less than a month. I sound better and feel more confident. I previously done toastmasters, speech coach, speech therapy, and a udemy class. they all helped me and improve my ability to speak along with my confidence, but this really gave me the techniques for un blending my words. My family is from the south so every word gets shortened. And I’ve struggle with undoing that my entire life until now at age 46.

title: Little practice, lots of fluff
review:
Too much low-value “lesson” content in front of the practical practice exercises. 
I’m looking for a quick 10 minute a day skill builder, and end up spending all of my time trying yo tap through the “theory” content without getting to put it into practice. 
I regret the subscription.

title: Bugs
review: The app is good, but now it keeps acting up by taking down a lesson after you confirm it.

title: Don't download
review: This app is not worth it and makes you believe you are signing up for a weekly subscription but then will charge your card for a yearly amount. Ridiculous!!!!!

title: Great!
review: This is a very practical APP - it allowed for daily practice in small bites that I can easily digest.

title: Speaking skills
review: Super perfect

title: Way more confident
review: I looked for something to help me with my pace and my nervousness. I used Speeko for about a month before my big presentation, I was confident, I didn’t speed through, and my heart wasn’t pumping through my chest. Very helpful.

title: So helpful!
review: Speeko provides so many different exercises and techniques to help you power through any public speaking issues. I also love that they have a variety of exercise lengths so that you can do quick warm ups as well as longer lessons!

title: Random material
review: I found hard to align with the app how it is designed. The material is without any sequence. Not much helpful but I stuck by paying for the whole year fee and no cancellation option later.

title: Confidence boost

title: Very cool app
review: Cool app. It was the best I tried them all.

title: Amazing
review: Speeko has helped me so much with my public speaking, I don’t know how I did it before Speeko!

title: Refused to refund
review: Horrible customer service. Horrible soon don’t download SCAM. Refused to refund subscription

title: Not a good experience
review:
Unfortunately, the app has no clear information on how to cancel the subscription after making the one year payment, and no clear ways for refund.
So once you pay you will not get any refund unless there are hidden ways that are not clear to users and lake transparency.

title: Scam, be very careful!
review: I cancelled and they charged me 79.9$

title: Speeko
review: Useless app.beware of sneaky annual subscription

title: Overall satisfaction
review: Helpfyl for sure, i was hoping it would actually provide speaking intellect.

title: Scam Likely..
review:
UPDATE: I was offered a refund from the company which never came. I stand by this review. 

I purchased the annual Premium subscription for this app accidentally. The annual subscription cost is $50 and I figured that since I had already purchased it, I might as well use it. 

But, upon trying to use my "Premium" features, there was none. I did not have access to them despite paying $50 for them. So, I then tried to reach out to customer service within the app only to have none of my messages send because apparently "something went wrong" on their end. My guess is that you can't even reach them within the app and that it's just for show. 

I then sent an email, asking to either be given access to the features I paid for or to be given a refund. I have not heard a single thing back from them in over a month. 

As wonderful as this app could be, I suggest you avoid it.

title: Fantastic app
review: There are not that many relevant and super useful apps but Speeko is one of them.  It makes it easy and seamless to practice public speaking or really and speech skills which I desperately need for work. I highly recommend! The premium subscription is A+

title: Frustrating Waste of Time
review:
This app might be helpful for somebody who is terrible at public speaking and afraid to practice in front of real people.  

However, if you are a professional who speaks for a living and you’re trying to improve your skills to the next level, it will be completely useless.

It had nothing to correct from my speech, so it just made up a bunch of things. For example, it said I had 38 filler words because I use the word “like”, “actually” and “so” and it didn’t consider the context of those words at all. This app is like a robot with no brain. In that sentence it would said “like” is a filler word, when actually it’s necessary for the meaning of the sentence. It also would say my use of the word “actually” there was a filler word. 

Along those lines it also said my words were vague because I used the word “something”, but again there is a place and time when the word “something” means something instead of just anything. See what I did there? That would be frowned upon by this app. 

It seems to be trained on certain words, being common filler words or common vague words, and then it just finds those in your speech and points them out whether it makes any sense in the context of your speech.

It is not intelligent enough to be helpful for somebody who is advanced speaking level.

The one redeeming factor is it allows your to practice your speaking skills with its little games, but with no viable feedback, you don’t really need an app for that. Just record yourself or practice in the mirror the old fashion way.

title: A Game-Changer for Public Speaking!
review:
Speeko is an absolute gem for anyone looking to improve their public speaking skills! As someone who's always been nervous about presentations and interviews, this app has been a total game-changer for me.

What I love most is how it analyzes my speech in real-time, giving me gentle nudges to improve my pace, tone, and word choice. It's like having a personal speech coach in my pocket! The AI technology is impressive and feels very trustworthy - knowing that my recordings are private gives me peace of mind.

The interface is super intuitive, making it easy to see where I need to focus my efforts. I particularly enjoy the personalized 2-minute daily exercises. They're quick enough to fit into my busy schedule but effective enough that I've noticed significant improvements in my speaking confidence.

Whether you're preparing for a big presentation, want to speak up more in meetings, or just aim to be a better communicator overall, Speeko is an invaluable tool. It's helped me crush interviews and feel more confident in professional settings.

The only tiny suggestion I have is to maybe include more industry-specific exercises, but that's just a minor point. Overall, Speeko is fantastic, and I can't recommend it enough!

title: Amazing Game
review: I got this game a few months ago, due to speech team tournaments. It has helped tremendously. I thank the developers for it. One suggestion is for thee to be a little more features for the free account.

title: Technique
review: It’s all about your breath.

title: Love this app
review: Work’s amazingly well. Grammarly for speech.

title: Improving already
review: My confidence when i speak has improved since trying out this app. The app gives in depth feedback so you can see what you need to focus on and practice. Everything is very clear and easy to use on the app. No complaints.

title: Really cool idea!
review:
I’ve been using this app for a couple of months now and it’s been really helpful for my confidence and public speaking skills. I have been prepping for a lot of interviews recently and have had some presentations to do and speeko has been great for improving my communication and conversation skills.

I especially like the interface because it’s just so easy to use. I enjoy using the app and the feedback is actually so accurate I love it! Would definitely recommend!

title: Discover unknown speaking practices
review:
I consider myself fairly confident in public speaking, but I'm always seeking to improve. Speeko is a great tool for me, but I can also see it being a great tool for anyone who lacks confidence in public speaking or is simply looking to improve their speaking skills, due to its personalized features.

As I start applying for jobs, the app offers a variety of questions that help me practice interviewing more confidently. Not only do I benefit from the personalized courses, but through the coaching section, I also discovered articles and practices on speaking and grammar that I never realized could improve my confidence and abilities, even if it is a minor difference. For instance, the coaching section on “speaking with your eyes” is something I would never have deemed to be impactful in a conversation. I look forward to continuing to use this app to reflect on my speaking skills and learn new techniques to boost my confidence.

title: Speaks for itself
review:
This is the best speech app EVER. I am a podcast host and I use it everyday to warm-up, practice my delivery, etc. 

Must have for podcasters, journalists, creators, executives…

title: Best app thus far
review: Best speaking app f measuring your abilities on the market - but for articulation it seems to randomly give incorrect feedback “unclear/clear”

title: Some good content, but too many distractions
review: I subscribed to a full year of the app, yet it is very tiresome to get consistent requests for more money via coaching. That as well as constant requests to taste and feedback on the exercises. This really detracts from the experience. The core app is good tho

title: Amazing Concept & Super Efficient
review: I’ve been using this app for the past few weeks to prep for interviews and I’m already seeing amazing improvements in my speech. The app catches errors in my speaking that I was completely ignorant to before. It also encourages you to think on your feet, with a randomized prompt generator that gives you 8 seconds to prepare and 2 minutes to respond. Overall I’ve loved my experience so far. Couldn’t recommend it enough

title: Amazing Concept & Super Effectove
review: I started using this app just a few weeks ago to practice for interviews and I'm already seeing amazing improvements in my speech. The app catches all sorts of speech errors that I was completely ignorant to before. It also implores you to think on your feet, with features like randomized prompt generation that you have 8 seconds to prepare for and 2 minutes to respond to. Overall I've been loving it. Couldn't recommend it enough!

title: So Helpful!
review: This app has really increased my confidence with public speaking now I always feel prepared and calm before any presentation

title: It is a great product with a greater potential
review:
Here are some of my recommendations
- add daily drill sets, exercise ( tongue twisters, low humming, loud talking, etc)
- score the progress on a scale so i can see how much improvement i am making on each front. I know graphs are there but i’d like granular numbers for each exercise type.
- add analysis of facial expressions 
- have scores in random prompt summaries as well. 
- i want more recommendations or KPIs than just intonation, modularity, pace.
- i was able to get this for $30 a year and thats the value i see in this at the moment. For $60 a year or more i need a lot more detail and functionality.

title: Works great, very helpful
review: This app is great to prepare for a presentation and I love that it helps with all aspects - from calming down beforehand to using powerful body language while you’re speaking

title: Does What It Says, and Does It Well
review:
I started using Speeko a few weeks ago; it’s clean, simple to use, and effective. 

I have mostly used it for practice prompts and warmups, and to monitor my own speech during important meetings; it’s made me much more aware of the filler words I use, and has started to impact my day to day habits and allows me to think more deeply about the way I’m speaking.

title: Decent
review: I’m pretty skilled in public speaking so I expected a good result that touched on speed, dialect, tone, pausing, infliction, intonation and fillers. App told me I was dynamic, had good pace, used 2 fillers, had good pausing, and I used available vocabulary for word choice. Articulation is unclear (as I suspected since I like to jump around ideas unless given a prompt). As long as you search up the areas you’re lacking in, the internet will guide you on how to improve each area. It’s kind of an art mixed with a science so unless you know what’s important for persuasive speaking and actively research each area, it’ll be a little more difficult to know how to improve. Best way is recording yourself and listening.

title: Feedback is terrible
review: The feedback is quite weak. The exercises are also lacking.

title: Very buggy
review: Before I could even start the free trial the app bugged out on my upon using apple pay - I got a welcome email but I got an error message, the app still prompt me to sign up, and I still don’t have access to all the lessons. Yet, the subscription does show up under my Apple subscriptions. I really want to like this app but from the get-go, it has failed to give me an opportunity to do so. Developers please reach out to me as I have tried to contact customer support through the app itself but again I received an error message.

title: Love the feed back!
review: So far I love the options for 1-2 min exercises or 10 min depending on your time.  But it motivates you one way or another to keep practicing, repeat exercises and listen to your self. I’m an MC and I think this app will definitely help me improve my skills and confidence. My challenges have been pronunciation, mumbling, and speaking too fast. I look forward to the new MC on the way…

title: Poor execution (but a good idea)
review:
I paid $49.99 for a subscription. The concept is good, but the execution was poor. I used it on both my MacBook and iPhone but the two were not in sync. I was often inexplicably logged out of the app, so it’s not clear that my recordings and progress were saved / synced.

The transcription just didn’t generate sometimes, which was incredibly frustrating since that was what I wanted. 

I canceled my subscription because I stopped using it due to these issues.

title: Great app helped me in my speaking abilities
review: Have been using this app for 10 months and truly enjoy the regular exercises and feedback I see my speed has improved a lot and I feel a lot confident customer support has been great as well.

title: Preparing for my keynote
review: It’s a great product, the only this is that I keep getting hit with articulation being unclear. I am articulate but am wondering if there is a cultural reference here. I have a slight Chicago accent. It may be me or may be an area for growth for the app. I am using Speeko to prepare for my keynote next week.

title: Thanks! I decided to jump in to my subscription on July 5!

I’m looking forward to an improved public speaking experience. Thanks for the coaching. I look forward Speekio you are my master.

title: Speeko
review: This app is really good for helping with pronunciation, speech preparation, pitch, and simply being a good conversationalist.  I am glad I discovered it.

I’ve yet to find another app that continues to up my game despite having given thousands of presentations at this point in my career. Bravo!

The support team is also outstanding - they went above and beyond to help me with a technical issue. I highly recommend this app to anyone looking to enhance their voice and communication skills.

title: Toastmasters Experience
review: It’s is providing more tools for the Toatmaster on my schedule, and at my pace.

title: Thoughtful and well-designed app!

But what I didn't expect was how much fun I would have using it to practice toasting at weddings and other family events. I can't recommend it enough!

title: Great App

It's helped me become a more confident and effective speaker, whether I'm presenting at work or giving a speech at a friend's wedding. The app is easy to use and the feedback is spot-on. I highly recommend it to anyone looking to improve their public speaking skills.

title: Very pleased

Only thing I would say is maybe add more lessons and different challenges but regardless it’s all repetition and practice!

title: So much better than expected

title: A new best friend
review:
As a voice coach myself, I know that speakers need the right people to listen to them, and give constructive feedback. Now Speeko can offer that with AI technology. Give it a try and maybe Speeko will be your new friend as well. 
RL

title: It's a game-changer!
review:
I absolutely love the Speeko app! It has completely transformed the way I communicate.

One of the things I love most about the app is the speech analysis feature. It provides detailed feedback on my speaking habits and helps me identify areas where I can improve. I've found that just a few minutes of practice each day has made a huge difference in the way I sound when giving presentations or speaking in public.

The interface is also super user-friendly and easy to navigate. I love being able to track my progress and see how much I've improved over time.

I highly recommend the Speeko app to anyone looking to improve their communication skills.

title: Hate it
review: It’s so lame. I hate it. It doesn’t even help with speaking. I have a little speaking problem, I rush a lot and my parents can’t even understand this doesn’t help so thanks for publishing trash.

title: Wonderful app!
review: Really helping me improve my communication skills! A beautifully designed app with great content. Keep up the good work!

title: Speeko rocks!
review: Love this app. Helps tremendously!

title: Not Working
review: The app just flat out isn’t working. The candle exercise won’t load. I went to chat with support and that wouldn’t load. Then I realized I wasn’t signed in, so I went to Sign In with Apple and got an error code for that too. Fix it soon or I’m gonna need a refund.

title: Fantastic!
review: It's clear that the developer really cared about creating an app that would help people inprove their speaking ability. It makes it so easy to refine all the necessary details for a presentation and it's so easy to use.

title: Best app for public speaking
review: I’ve tried quite a few apps for enhancing my voice and public speaking skills. Speeko is The One! It’s the most comprehensive, holistic, and most importantly… FUN!! Thank you to the creators and developers of this app.

title: helping a ton
review: this app is great. i find that the hardest part of practicing something as ambiguous as speaking is doing it in a structured way, and speeko totally knocked it out of the park. they remind u when you said you were going to practice, and they also bring their lessons back to real life circumstances, so you don’t feel like you’re practicing in a vacuum. highly recommend

title: Love this app!
review: As a young professional, public speaking is one of my biggest anxieties. Speeko helps me practice and feel confident :)

title: Awesome
review:
I’ve always been afraid of public speaking but no more. Thanks Speeko!!

So easy to use and intuitive. Its been a few months and the change is clear !

title: Speekoo
review: This is one of my favorite apps! I haven’t been using it but will start back up because I use to get nervous speaking in crowds and would figet. I really never got my audiences attention until I started practicing g with Speeko. The exercises, and recordings helped me improve in areas I never thought possible. I started recording myself so I could see what I looked like and if I needed to speak louder and then Speeko critiques you and this app helped build my confidence. I would recommend this app if you have to Speeko to an audience , especially if you want them to listen.

title: Love it
review: I can see my speaking skills improving even within a month! Versatile topics that cover various communication areas. I try to use it almost every day. Really helpful!!

title: Powerful insights
review: Speeko provides detailed feedback about several aspects of speech. It’s a really powerful tool that I wish I found years ago.

title: Great way to improve speaking confidence!
review: Speaking has always been a weak point for me and I’m so glad I found Speeko! It’s great for improving your speaking confidence in a fun way. The “personality” of the app feels like you’re working with a real teacher who is understanding but pushes you to improve using different techniques - and you get real-time feedback like you would with a real teacher!

title: No
review: Withholds all useful information unless you pay (an exorbitant amount) for it. Extremely disappointed. Don’t bother downloading as all it does in its free mode is scrape your personal data

title: Great idea
review: I have been on this app for a couple of months. It’s really a great idea for those intimidated by public speaking or unconfident in interviews. It’s a good way to practice on your own. It has some really good tips and found the “impromptu speaking” section most helpful, with “engaging an audience” also helpful. However I’m mainly using this for practicing interview/and impromptu work speaking. I don’t know how accurate the AI is that provides feedback but either way you are practicing speaking which can only help. I appreciate the interview questions that can be used as prompts for practice but I think there could be a lot more content dedicated to interviewing. Some of it is a bit repetitive (you will get the same posture and breathing tips before every single speaking exercise) and I think an entire section related to calming/nervous and inclusive speaking is a little much -these are relevant for everyday life but they don’t teach anything related to how to be a better speaker. I find they are just repetitive things I’ve learned elsewhere  already. I generally think there could be alot more useful content on speaking and wish that would be prioritized.

title: Great App!!!
review:
It is a great app and I would be subscribed to their service if I wasn’t broke… haha

BUT what’s great is even with the free trial version you can do a lot with this app. So it’s easy to see if you want to be subscribed to the service. 

I recommend downloading this app and just trying it out before missing out on it!!!

title: Consistency is key!
review: Stay consistent with the daily warmups and modules! The exercises and techniques will become a habit that will be easier to incorporate into your public speaking!!

title: So much more confident in my speaking!
review: Turned this app on every time I spoke with my team and it was super helpful for feedback and the lessons were game changing! Absolutely love it.

title: refund me please. I am 100% not, nor ever was, intending to subscribe
review:
excuse me but i in NO WAY intended to or was aware of in ANY WAY wanting to subscribe for AN ENTIRE YEAR let alone a month .... as without so much as sampling your services, beyond simply downloading, looking at the app, but not starting any lessons or anything at all! . ridiculous. dark. UI. 1 star. I am super upset as a consumer you have just ripped me off and i will not let this go lightly. 

I NEVER PUT MY THUMB ON THE BUTTON OR AGREED TO THIS : DARK UI / IMMORAL AND MESSED UP.

title: Subscription Issues
review: I have emailed a few times about this issue. I have a paid subscription and is not unlocking my courses.

title: Great app! Car mode suggestion
review: I absolutely love this app! I only wish there was a car mode or exercises to allow for easy learning and practice on my commute to and from work.

title: Great
review: App

title: Finding My Authentic Voice
review:
I'm incredibly impressed by this app and the variety of exercises it offers! While I consider myself to be a decent public speaker and I don't use the app daily, it has still helped me build confidence and discover and fine-tune my own voice when communicating with others. I work in healthcare and speak with patients and their loved ones every day. If I know I'm about to have a difficult conversation about a patient's diagnosis or the death of a loved one, Speeko helps me warm up and coaches me away from my anxiety and into a voice that is authentic, genuine, and human-centered. That is what I love about Speeko. It's not about speaking perfectly. It's about speaking in our authentic voice to connect with the people around us. I hope more people can discover this app and use it as a tool for speaking authentically during those important moments in our lives.

P.S. The exercises are fun and silly in themselves and the graphics are incredibly cute. Kudos to the developers and their hard work!

title: Speeko Helped Me Find My Voice (Again)
review:
Earlier this month I attended a friends wedding. It was my first in person event since 2019 and I was excited!

However, after only an hour of mingling at the reception I realized what two years of working remotely had done to my ability to talk. Not only had I lost my ability to speak clearly - I had talked so much more than I was used to that I was literally losing my voice!

Something had to change…

The next morning I installed Speeko. For the past two weeks I’ve been using their guided lessons and warm-ups to gradually improve different aspects of my speech. It’s been great! I especially love the ‘random prompt’ exercises. 

Thanks to Speeko the next wedding I attend I’ll be embarrassing myself less at the cocktail hour and more on the dance floor!

title: idk
review: im giving this a five star right off the bat, im the most antisocial person almost everywhere i go. i definitely need this and i will write a better review when i utilize it.

title: Great App!!
review: Downloaded it the other day and already feel my public speaking has improved!

title: Mixture of positive and negative
review:
Generally the free version is so limited they might as well make you pay for the app right off the get go. Maybe I’m missing something. Just disappointed that the free version is so limited! 

On the bright side though, the developers were smart because the voice of the narrator is energetic and fun!! (I mock Pearson MyMathLab narrator for an extremely monotone voice). (we know math is a boring subject, let’s at least make it fun) Ok I’m getting off topic but hope you get my point!! I encourage you to check it out and please DO NOT ever switch to a narrator that’s dull and boring!! He could use this app!

title: Anxious in personal conversations
review: I have a lot of anxiety about how I speak in just regular conversations. This app is helping me learn to overcome that anxiety and it’s actually enjoyable. The information is presented in a really fun way and the graphics are so cute. I love the bite-sized lesson format so you can do as much or as little as you want. And I’m surprised at how much is accessible in the free version. Definitely considering upgrading. Content and app developers all get an A+.

title: No more accent!
review: The best investment I have ever made. Can you please add more tongue twister examples, seems like there are only ~20, but I would like to practice more, they have helped me a lot with improving my articulation. Thank you!

title: Effective and Useful app
review: I have been enjoying Speeko and using it regularly. It has improved my speaking skills and my fear of public speaking. It is an effective and useful app that has made a significant impact on my life personally and in business.

title: Improvement in Speech Delivery
review:
I bought this app 3 weeks prior to my defence of my doctor of nursing practice degree. I followed a simple plan and use this app daily. 
Using this app allowed me to practice so much that I took off excesive content and to address difficult phrasing.
Because the app provides a neat transcript, I was able to cut and paste the portions in which my speech was clearer and focused.
I would highly recommend it.

title: Speeko
review: An amazing app that has helped me become more engaging when I speak. People are listening to me and enjoying my delivery. Thanks Speeko. Communication is the way to get noticed and be successful at work.

title: just starting
review: I am trying to improve my public speaking and communication with people in general. So far it's not bad, i still have to continue on it to see if it works or not.

title: Will change your life
review:
Hands down the best public speaking app in the market. I downloaded the app as I had to make a speech. My public speaking skills was definitely my weakest skill set. This app is amazing. Filled with so much tips. Not only will it improve your public speaking skills, but it addresses other areas such as fear, anxiety and nervousness. 

I downloaded another app as well but I ended up sticking with speeko as it was superior in every way. 
For a full month before the day of my speech, I was using this app. I love how you can also practice and record your speech within the app and get feedback. Needless to say, when the day came for my speech, I absolutely crushed it. Everyone that heard me came up to me and said they loved the speech and that I looked and sounded so calm and natural, little do they know, I was extremely nervous but we can keep that a secret. 

I will continue using this app everyday to improve. It’s definitely an investment that will help you in life.
Keep up the good work to the people that developed the app and keep on adding new content.

title: Great app
review: Helps me before a job interview.

title: Great app
review: its a dimanod in a rough. great app.

title: It’s nice to know I don’t always need an audience
review: Thanks for being there at any hour I have a speech.
Spot on y’all win

title: Improving My Speech
review: Already ☺️fired up and ready to go!

title: This app is so amazingly awesome!!!!!
review:
I love this app. I have literally no enough words to describe how supper helpful this app is. 
It is encouraging, engaging, meaningful skill learning, user friendly, practical, smart and fun. 
I am really enjoying the process of improving my speech and presentation skills not only for my job but also in life. It is also so a wonderful pronunciation tool specially when English is not your mother language. The instant feedbak you get is so helpful. 
The confidence ones develop by doing all the courses and exercises. 
This app is so amazingly awesome!!! Thank you to the masterminds behind it

title: Excellent for the “too shy” speakers, such as myself ! :]
review:
Am so grateful I stumbled across this app! 

The technology really adds to giving immediate feedback on how and what I speak.

The design is warm and engaging. 

The content as well as important topics such as telling a story, showing care, presentation and even how one uses their body as a voice box instrument is useful, impactful and shows deep thought. 

Also appreciate the responsive support and service, for any questions I had.

title: Not worth it
review:
The exercises are lame. The first part that’s free actually works well the second part when they actually have sentences with spacing in between and explains how to speak with clarity is great. 
 but after that it just gets lazy. The The rest of the “exercises”  are just recordings and you reading a bunch of information you read, recordings read to you, basically stuff you can find on Google for free. I was very disappointed in this, seriously save your money.

title: Awesome !!!! Highly recommended
review: Great app for all the user who wants to be the leader not the follower .

title: Love It
review: It's Great

title: Brilliant app
review: There are many books, videos and podcasts on communication but practice is key. This app is BRILLIANT and works seamlessly to help users practice all key aspects of oral communication from speech making to impromptu conversations. And the preview lessons are great.  My kids and I enjoy using it during and after dinner. When I practice in the morning, I notice better conversation and communication throughout the day and I have definitely improved over time. For anyone seeking to improve their everyday or formal speaking skills, this app is well, well worth it! One day soon “like” will be eliminated as a filler in my kids’ conversations! 😁 I don’t know how they did it, but these developers created the very tool we needed!

title: Morning routine (5-10min a day)
review:
As a voice analyzer this app is amazing. 

-Tone

-Pace

-Filler words

-Pausing

-Articulation (did the iPhone understand your words?)

It is able to analyze all these different aspects of my voice and give it back to in the form of recording. 

Thereby actual tracking of progress can occur.

 The only thing I would say and Speeko has recently improved on is the random topic generator.

Have a greater variety of questions because in late 2020 the questions that were being asked were very repetitive.

title: No helpful feedback!!! Waste of my money!!!
review: Speeko app doesn’t provide any feedback to help me improve my speaking!!! Sad that I wasted my money :(

title: Awesome
review: This app helps me with my public speaking immensely!

title: A Perfect Tool To Become A More Confident Speaker
review:
Let me first stay that there’s no magical pill that will take you from zero to Steve Jobs, when wanting to become a more confident and charismatic speaker.

With that being said, I want to cover how Speeko has been helping me become an overall better speaker in personal and professional settings. First, I have a nasally voice and I often get very self-conscious when giving speeches for my day job. Speeko’s amazing practice routines is literally like a ‘Toastmasters’ in your pocket so you can practice wherever you feel comfortable- my introverted self loves this option.

Lastly, the option to book a 1:1 session is a great option to take a more in depth deep dive and get feedback in real time.

Overall, I’m pleased with this app, and I plan on using this daily along with Duolingo and Headspace to become my best self in 2021.

title: Fun app
review: Great app with excellent customer support.

title: I LOVE this app!!
review:
I started using this app about 2 weeks ago and I’m sold! I went through a few lessons and I loved it. The one that helped me the most was about learning how to project my voice. I applied that to my IG videos. My views went from 100 to 2K! 

Thanks so much Speeko! You have a forever fan in me!! 🙏🏾😁

title: Great app - love the job interview training
review: As a person who has always struggled with public speaking, having a convenient way to practice these skills daily and get immediate feedback has been so helpful. I have noticed the difference in my speaking habits. I wish there had been something like this years ago. Also this app has a section with job interview questions, which is such a service! This app is pricey but worth it.

title: Cool but costly
review: Speeko is a unique app for improving public speaking skills. I enjoyed the warmups and focus areas. It’s the next best thing to Toastmasters. However, the price tag is just too steep for me.

title: Best Interview Practice
review:
Highly recommend this app for practicing interview questions! You can record yourself, listen to yourself speak, and get feedback where you can improve. 

I will start using this app to practice my demo sessions as well!

title: Force closes
review: Can’t even use the app because it force closes every time.

title: Volume is excessively loud on desktop (headphones)
review:
The app plays sounds extremely loudly when wearing headphones. No other app does this.

Also, it seems a little awkward from a user experience perspective that the daily warm-ups change if you switch to another device.

title: Effective App
review: The techniques used actually worked! I’ve been using Speeko to build my speaking skills and it has helped me transform and speak confidently!

title: Truly Great
review: I signed up and became a premium member rather quickly.. This is a practical piece o software and ANY person could benefit. Try it!

title: Filler word detection is off
review: On the first exercise and  it says I’ve used five filler words. Went back and tried again, same thing, only this time I recorded myself on another device and listened back to my own performance. There were definitely no filler words so I’m a little confused to what the app is picking up.

title: Need to pay for subscription
review: Like the idea of this app and enjoyed the free training. Completed all the free modules In about 20 mins, now everything else is locked without paying for subscription

title: Want to use app? PAY FOR IT!
review:
I went into this app expecting it to have free features. Instead I get bombarded with “SUBSCRIBE NOW! UNLOCK EVERYTHING!” on every single ‘lesson’ and recording.
If the developers want to charge people for their app they may as well put a price on it and not trick people with ‘’in app purchases’’

title: Amazing
review: I love the Speeko app. It really works, has amazing features, and allows me to schedule real time coaching sessions for reasonable prices. Great job with this app!

title: Ridiculous
review: Downloaded to try out because it seemed like a cool app. Literally didn’t even have it for 2 minutes before I was promoted to pay for full version or try out free for blah blah blah amount of days blah blah blah. How about give someone more time with the app without having to commit before asking for fees.

title: Too personal
review: I’d appreciate the addition of prompts that are far less personal. It’s uncomfortable sharing personal thoughts with this app. Otherwise, decent app.

title: Super fun
review: I’m a teacher so I’m used to being in front of a group of kids , but I hate to present in  front of parents parents and other groups because I’ve always hated public speaking. I’ve thought about joining ToastMasters groups but don’t feel comfortable enough, so I’m glad there’s an app for this. I like that I can choose when to get reminders ,  how easy it is to use and the instant evaluation and feedback. The graphics are fun and I like the random topics to practice speaking in private on my own. I am wondering if the short lecture type lessons can be made into quick bits of information embedded within the lessons. I just started using the app, and I’m enjoying it and if there is a way for more motivation/ reminders of streaks during the day especially if I miss my daily lesson I would choose that option as well. Highly recommend it

title: 5 Minutes a Day Goes a Long Way
review: This is definitely one of my favorite new apps! I just downloaded it a week ago and I am already noticing an improvement in my speaking voice and pace. I love how you can practice pretty much any time anywhere and how easy this is to fit into your daily routine. I highly recommend this app to anyone who wants to feel more confident in their speaking voice!

title: Excellent App
review: Wonderful learning tools for all ages

title: So far so good, but...
review: There are errors in word structures when you’re prompted to recite, in some of the first lessons. It’s enough to throw me off when I trying to practice the techniques only to find a word out of place or not used correctly. I find myself anchoring on to this instead of focusing.

title: This app saved my life
review: Love this app!!!

title: Much improved
review:
Nice start, but there is not enough content to justify a subscription for one month, let alone one year.

Edit: I added two stars to my review as the app now has great new content and I have resubscribed. Some work still needs to be done to improve the speed and accuracy of the transcripts generated.

title: Great app, terrible narrator
review: Of all the ways to mess up they chose a narrator who doesn’t speak like a normal human and is quite awkward to listen to. That said the other features and overall functions are useful.

title: Poor accuracy
review:
I was enjoying this app until I got to the eloquence section of the “Vocal Delivery Basics”. I would give a speech, careful to use pauses instead of filler words, and then it would give me a poor rating and said I used 17 filler words. (Another problem is that they don’t even tell you which filler words you used). The button to replay my recording was also non-functional.
I then did the same exercise and purposefully used a ton of filler words (like, um, uhhhh) in every sentence, and they gave me a good grade and said I had used only 6 and that I had spoken fluently.
After that, I feel like I really can’t trust this app’s accuracy, and at the current price, that’s a big problem. I would like to hear if the developer plans on fixing this problem because I think this app has great potential.

title: Brand new user - love my first experience
review: Very impressive app! I love how smoothly it works and looks. There is a lot of content but I don’t feel overwhelmed by it. everything is well organized.

title: The authoritative resource for public speaking coaching
review: Speeko is amazing! The pièce de résistance is definitely the coaching lessons that analyze your speech and provide tailored feedback. There are also several audio lessons to help improve your speech delivery. Huge fan!

title: Best app I’ve ever used!
review: I’ve worked with public speaking coaches and paid for the one-on-one services to improve my public speaking skills. Then I found this app that’s a game changer. It covers almost everything you can get from a speaking coach. And the experience of using the app makes me feel like whoever made this app is not only brilliant but also has a heart!! Highly recommend!

title: Awesome 😎
review: Awesome 👏

title: Great app for anyone!!
review: This app is perfect for improving public speaking. I’ve had no troubles with it and it works like magic!

title: Heaven sent app
review:
😇😇😇
The customer service team are angels and the app is heaven sent during this time of quarantine! I can’t think of a better way to spend my time then to work on something that’s cause me lots of anxiety in the past before. Anthony is the best!!

title: One of the best apps!
review: There are a lot of practice activities, suggested exercises, instant (and useful) feedback plus daily warm-ups. It’s just been 5 days into my free trial and I decided to purchase the one year subscription. This is just what I needed! I’m glad I downloaded this app.

title: Good But Not Good Enough
review: Great app to help you to improve your speaking skills; however, there is issues with tracking your progress. For example the transcripts of saved recordings are not accurate at all and the app doesn’t factor in different vocal ranges. It really gives a disadvantage for those who have lower pitch ranges.

title: This helped me speak with more confidence
review: There are good apps and great apps. This is a great app.

title: Incredible!
review: I love this app! The techniques are so much fun!!

title: Amazing Product
review: Speeko is an amazing app. It is helping me become a much better speaker. Every time I complete a lesson my confidence goes up and I get that much better. This app is worth every penny and I think that it should be on everyone’s company phone and paid for by their company.

title: Can’t believe I payed money for this
review: Most practice exercises in this app provide no feedback at all. You can say whatever you want into the mic and it will still give you a check mark and accept it as correct. Furthermore there are no example recordings to demonstrate the skills they are trying to teach. “Practice varying your pitch” ok but give me some example recordings where people are varying their pitch! This app is very frustrating and not conducive to learning at all. Would not recommend

title: Fantastic (even for pros!)
review: I’m already a decently okay, not shy, public speaker. So, when I downloaded the app, I didn’t know how helpful it could actually be... I was so wrong!!! The daily reminders were a great way to stay on track and I learned a lot of insightful tips on how to control my voice during the times I do get nervous. SUPER helpful!!!

title: Nico from Speeko
review: I learned how to speak a new language in less than 3 days!

title: Inspiring New Tool
review: Speeko is an innovative tool that combines science with simple end-user designs to improve speaking skills.  The tool is super easy to use, and I have experience immediate improvements in my confidence with speaking.  I look forward to seeing where this organization goes next!

title: Easy to use; easy to understand
review: Enjoy the interface, easy to use and access lessons, feedback, and progress. Would recommend to anyone looking to improve communication skills.

title: Awesome product!
review: This app made a big difference for improving my pace and voice inflection! It’s like having a personal coach!

title: Excellent App + Suggestions
review:
I downloaded Speeko with two other similar apps, and deleted the other two after trying all out for a week. Speeko strikes a good balance among voice exercises, instruction videos, and impromptu speaking topics. I also particularly like the “stats” section where I could see how I do (and improve) in each area. 

One thing I find frustrating, though, is that there isn’t enough demonstration on HOW I could vary my pitches. I wish there could be a side by side comparison of a flat speech and a more colorful speech. Or have Speeko point out where in my recording that I could vary my pitch, and how to accomplish that. Instead, I’m only receiving a generic feedback that I sound robotic, without concrete advice on how to fix it. 

Meanwhile, after being around 10 days in, I’m already done with 1/4 of the whole course. I look forward to seeing more content coming out to make my annual subscription worthwhile. 

Overall great work!

title: Great!
review: Lovelytechniques

title: If you’re a potential public speaker...
review: This app boosted my confidence in public speaking. Get the app NOW!

title: Not free
review: Says it is free with in app purchases but nothing accessible without paid subscription.

title: Use ads instead of paying for it
review: This looks like a great app and I know I need improvement in public speaking but I'm a young kid who does have money

title: 5 Minutes A Day Really Works
review: I’ve always struggled with public speaking and never figured out how to get past the fear of speaking in front of an audience. Using Speeko for roughly 5 minutes every couple days has really helped me control my fear of public speaking and has helped me become a more confident speaker overall! I highly recommend the app to anyone who is trying to make a difference in their public speaking ability.

title: It’s definitely challenging me.
review: I wanted to give 5 stars as it challenging me. I feel I am getting better just 10 moms daily and I am feeling the effect of it.

title: If you want to improve your speaking... get this app!
review:
This is probably my favorite app I have ever downloaded! I literally use it every day, and I love going back and listening to old recordings to hear the progress I have made. My favorite part of the app is the Random Topic generator because it forces you to think fast, and allows you to review your results every two minutes, so that you can instantly apply what you should be doing better in the next speech. 

To the developers:
First off... well done. 
Second, it would be cool if the performance review metrics had a number attached to them. I like to really dive into the reviews to figure out what I can be doing better, and it would be nice if they had an exact score. Then with those scores, you could have a number tracking your overall growth. Just a thought, but at the end of the day, great app.

title: Pitch Practice
review: I’ve been looking for something like this FOREVER!

title: So good! Def recommended.
review: This is the only app I use for pitch practice. I especially like the “filler words” insight because I used to use a lot of them and have been able to reduce them significantly. Thanks Speeko!

title: MUST HAVE APP! 😍
review: I don’t normally write reviews but this is an awesome app! I found out about it recently and it SAVED me for my Investor Pitch Night :) it helps you easily & quickly figure out where in your pitch you need improvement and they even can help you 1-on-1. Highly recommend this app to everyone.

title: Love it!
review: Immediately I was able to get feedback and hear my progress! I’m excited that I found this app!!
Excellent public speaking app!

title: Easy to use
review: Loved using speeko. Public speaking is super important skill and I haven’t found any good ways of improving without tedious recordings of myself. This makes it super easy to see what to improve on. 💯

title: Solid-feeling app. Really cool approach
review: I like using apps like this (ie Duolingo) that help you learn a new skill over time. I haven’t gotten thru all of the lessons yet but I really like the instant feedback and flow of the lessons. The app itself is very solid and usable.

title: Very useful
review: Great help preparing for presentations - a must have

title: Career Changer
review: For so long, I’ve struggled with effectively communicating with my co workers. Creating great ideas and executing tasks efficiently are fantastic but they mean nothing if you can’t communicate them correctly. Speeko taught me how to do this and ever since my career has gone up another level. I’m able to communicate with my peers and go into interviews with confidence. Thanks Speeko team! You guys are doing something truly special.

title: LOVE IT
review: This is an amazing application that has immediately made me feel more confident. It helps me prepare for presentations at school! My teachers even complimented me on my improvement in public speaking. Love this app!!!!!

title: Prepared and Confident!
review: Speeko made me feel so prepared and confident when practicing my public speaking! It focused in on a lot of the things that I can’t necessarily pick up on while practicing such as tone intonations that really make for an effective public speaker. Truly ground breaking stuff!

title: Great tool for building confidence in your speech
review: Very clean and aesthetic user interface, but the real catch are the lessons and the analysis they give you to improve different aspects of your speech. This is a great practice tool for when you’re not yet confident with a presentation but want to be!

title: Great idea!
review: When I first saw what this app was about, I realized that there is no other app like this! It is so helpful for anyone looking to work on their speaking skills! I can already feel the improvement!!

title: Love it
review: Started using the app because my voice tends to get high pitched and I start talking way too fast.  This has helped a lot!!!  It’s so nice to be able to hear the difference :)
my crops have been watered, my skin is moisturized, my waist is snatched & my husband came back from the war all because of this app. it’s the bees knees 🎈

title: Awesome!
review: Helped me get over social anxiety by learning to vary my tone. You don’t really know how the intonation of your voice affects your career and relationships until you’ve tried this app. Not only it fun to use but it also has changed my life by making me less self-conscious when I speak.

title: Genius
review: I like the app a lot but was able to complete all the lessons within seven (7) days which is the term of the free trial. In my honest opinion, the app is overpriced. A $1.99 monthly subscription is more ideal. For this reason I give it three stars.

title: Amazing app!!! Wish there was more scenarios!
review: Really smooth UI and UX Design in this app. The lessons were amazing and loved the short lessons. This helped me feel comfortable with speaking with a crowd. However as the app progresses I wish there were more scenarios or advanced lessons after you finished the basics.

title: Best app!!!
review: I’m on my schools debate team, and I’ve been searching for a way to improve my speaking. I can guarantee you won’t find a better app!

title: Incredible app
review: Incredible speaking assistant app. I was looking for something like this to help me improve my public speaking skills. The app has significantly exceeded my expectations. None of the other apps are robust and helpful as Speeko. Highly recommend!

title: The best app ever
review: Buy this app! Trust me.

title: Fulfilling a desperately needed niche
review: So glad someone did this app correctly! Verbal communication skills are so important, yet there are so few options available to someone looking to improve. This is a gem for anyone who recognizes the importance of verbal communication and is motivated to improve.
Super easy to use!

title: Engaging & insightful!
review: Easy and intuitive to use! Practicing with the different exercises helped me prepare for my presentation and actually got me excited for it!

title: Cool app
review: I really liked using this app in the privacy of my own home. The metrics & analytics that show you how you sounded in terms of pace, etc. are really cool
